onboarding.title: Welcome {{name}}
onboarding.subtitle: Create the care circle of the person you are supporting.
onboarding.hint: You will then be able to invite siblings, professionals and neighbours into this circle.
onboarding.firstName: First name of your loved one
onboarding.error: Creating the circle failed. Please try again.

title: Care circle
subtitle: The people around {{name}}: members, invitations and caregivers.
subtitleNoName: The people around your loved one: members, invitations and caregivers.
noCircle: Select a circle to manage its members.

roleHints.admin: Manages the circle, members and invitations. Full access.
roleHints.family: Writes everywhere: journal, profile, calendar, expenses.
roleHints.professional: Writes in the journal, vitals and medications.
roleHints.neighbor: Writes simple journal notes and views the calendar.

members.title: Members
members.removeConfirm: {{name}} will immediately lose access to all the circle's information. You can undo this by sending a new invitation.
members.leaveConfirm: You will no longer have access to this circle's information. An administrator will have to invite you again.

invites.title: Invitations
invites.subtitle: Invite siblings, a professional or a neighbour to join the circle with an account.
invites.dialogDescription: The person creates an account (or signs in) with this link and joins the circle with the chosen role.
invites.emailHint: If set, only this address will be able to accept the invitation.

links.title: Caregivers without an account
links.subtitle: Give a link to the home aide, the nurse or the neighbour: they write in the journal directly, with no account and no app.
links.explain: This link allows writing in the journal without an account or an app.
links.empty: No link yet. Create one for the home aide or the nurse.
links.shareHint: Send this link by text message or display it as a QR code at your loved one's home.
links.deleteConfirm: The link for {{name}} will stop working immediately and disappear from the list. Journal entries already written are kept.

equity.title: Care load balance
equity.subtitle: Who carries what: journal visits, completed tasks and attendance at appointments.
equity.previousNone: no activity in the previous period
equity.hint: Making the share of the load visible helps prevent the main caregiver's burnout, before exhaustion sets in.
equity.empty: No activity recorded over this period.

settings.title: Circle settings
settings.name: Circle name
settings.dangerHint: All the circle's data (journal, medications, documents, expenses) will be permanently deleted.
settings.deletePrompt: To confirm, type the first name of your loved one: {{name}}
